I have however found information on the plant Stellaria media (Stellaria stellarioides may be a synonym of this plant). 

Stellaria media, also known as Common Chickweed or Stellaria stellarioides, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is a small, annual herb with medicinal properties. The health benefits of Stellaria media include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues.

The bioactive constituents of Stellaria media include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids. These constituents contribute to its medicinal properties and are responsible for its therapeutic effects.

The most common herbal preparations made with Stellaria media include teas, infusions, and topical creams. These preparations are often used to treat skin irritations, wounds, and other conditions.
